generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
Preserve AADL architecture by scoping AGREE contracts to the correct component or implementation.
Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names when defining bounds in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree { ... };` to enclose AGREE contracts.
Define boolean range checks as `eq name : bool = expression;`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as typed ports or constants.
